sourceMovie.title: American Ultra
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: American Ultra (2015) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Nima Nourizadeh's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: RED
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If American Ultra clicked for you, RED (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after American Ultra?
faq.answer: Try RED, The Man from U.N.C.L.E., Central Intelligence—each shares DNA with American Ultra while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is American Ultra?
faq.answer: American Ultra (2015) is best described as Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is American Ultra worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
